word: G1036 - βυθίζω - bythízō - boo-thid'-zo - Begin to sink

sections.paragraph:
- Original: βυθίζω

- Transliteration: Buthizo

- Phonetic: boo-thid'-zo

- Definition:

1. to plunge into the deep, to sink

- Origin: from G1037

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1037; to sink; by implication to drown: - begin to sink drown.
